TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Daniel Ortega, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Nicaragua ta' misuw hya' ga Daniel Ortega, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux nya Daniel Ortega htagan beh sa nicyalakwa La Libertad qalang qasa.hiya yaba(Daniel Ortega Cerda) ru yaya(Lidia Saavedra) hmtuy sezi'.Ortega ru hiya sazing mtswe mrkyas lga,mwah mlahang na squilq.hiya mtsew (Humberto Ortega) ga mhetay ru miru biru pincyogan nya. Camilo Ortega maki sezi' uzi.hiya maki qsuyan kneril Germania lalu nya,wal mhuqil la. hiya musa hkangi' mtzyaw,qutux ngasal aring La Libertad musa Juigalpa tehok Managua .Ortega ru mtswe mqwas bah LaSalle pqwasan biru.hiya ru Arnoldo Aleman mrhuw mqwas biru nha. 15 kawas nya lga,Ortega snacka' sezi' hlahuy kkyapun la.suruw lga, hela tmwang(FSLN)hlahuy.1964 kawas,Ortega musa Guatemala ,maki qasa mrhuw klahang alang kkyapun la. 1967 kawas,hiya sangka' smi lukus ru qbubu ini ktan rkyas nya musa qmung pira ru qaya squilq maki Amerika. 1979 kawas Daniel Ortega ru Rosario Murillo kekong la.qsahuy qnxan maki cyugal laqi msqun musa Costa Rica . 2005 kawas Ortega ru Murillo mspun la.magal Roman kyokya mkgluw.qani msyahaw maki spat laqi nya.Murillo skayal na squilq pincyogan nya,maki Ortega sezi' kosi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *aniel orteɣa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw niʦ~ʨaraɣua taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *aniel orteɣa, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux nja *aniel orteɣa ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa niʦ~ʨjalakwa la liβerta* qalaŋ qas~ɕa.ħija jaβa(*aniel orteɣa ʦ~ʨer*a) ru jaja(li*ia s~ɕaa*e*ra) ħmtuj s~ɕeziʔ.orteɣa ru ħija s~ɕaziŋ mts~ɕwe mrkjas~ɕ lɣa,mwaħ mlaħaŋ na s~ɕquilq.ħija mts~ɕew (ħumβerto orteɣa) ɣa mħetaj ru miru βiru pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja. ʦ~ʨamilo orteɣa maki s~ɕeziʔ uzi.ħija maki qs~ɕujan kneril ɣermania lalu nja,wal mħuqil la. ħija mus~ɕa ħkaŋiʔ mtzjaw,qutux ŋas~ɕal ariŋ la liβerta* mus~ɕa *uiɣalpa teħok manaɣua .orteɣa ru mts~ɕwe mqwas~ɕ βaħ las~ɕalle pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija ru arnol*o aleman mrħuw mqwas~ɕ βiru nħa. ** kawas~ɕ nja lɣa,orteɣa s~ɕnaʦ~ʨkaʔ s~ɕeziʔ ħlaħuj kkjapun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa, ħela tmwaŋ(*s~ɕln)ħlaħuj.**** kawas~ɕ,orteɣa mus~ɕa ɣuatemala ,maki qas~ɕa mrħuw klaħaŋ alaŋ kkjapun la. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija s~ɕaŋkaʔ s~ɕmi lukus~ɕ ru qβuβu ini ktan rkjas~ɕ nja mus~ɕa qmuŋ pira ru qaja s~ɕquilq maki amerika. **** kawas~ɕ *aniel orteɣa ru ros~ɕario murillo kekoŋ la.qs~ɕaħuj qnxan maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi ms~ɕqun mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨos~ɕta riʦ~ʨa . **** kawas~ɕ orteɣa ru murillo ms~ɕpun la.maɣal roman kjokja mkɣluw.qani ms~ɕjaħaw maki s~ɕpat laqi nja.murillo s~ɕkajal na s~ɕquilq pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja,maki orteɣa s~ɕeziʔ kos~ɕi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 11, Daniel Ortega, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1946) mrhuw Nicaragua ta' misuw hya' ga Daniel Ortega, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux nya Daniel Ortega htagan beh sa nicyalakwa La Libertad qalang qasa.hiya yaba(Daniel Ortega Cerda) ru yaya(Lidia Saavedra) hmtuy sezi'.Ortega ru hiya sazing mtswe mrkyas lga,mwah mlahang na squilq.hiya mtsew (Humberto Ortega) ga mhetay ru miru biru pincyogan nya. Camilo Ortega maki sezi' uzi.hiya maki qsuyan kneril Germania lalu nya,wal mhuqil la. hiya musa hkangi' mtzyaw,qutux ngasal aring La Libertad musa Juigalpa tehok Managua .Ortega ru mtswe mqwas bah LaSalle pqwasan biru.hiya ru Arnoldo Aleman mrhuw mqwas biru nha. 15 kawas nya lga,Ortega snacka' sezi' hlahuy kkyapun la.suruw lga, hela tmwang(FSLN)hlahuy.1964 kawas,Ortega musa Guatemala ,maki qasa mrhuw klahang alang kkyapun la. 1967 kawas,hiya sangka' smi lukus ru qbubu ini ktan rkyas nya musa qmung pira ru qaya squilq maki Amerika. 1979 kawas Daniel Ortega ru Rosario Murillo kekong la.qsahuy qnxan maki cyugal laqi msqun musa Costa Rica . 2005 kawas Ortega ru Murillo mspun la.magal Roman kyokya mkgluw.qani msyahaw maki spat laqi nya.Murillo skayal na squilq pincyogan nya,maki Ortega sezi' kosi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *aniel orteɣa, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw niʦ~ʨaraɣua taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *aniel orteɣa, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux nja *aniel orteɣa ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa niʦ~ʨjalakwa la liβerta* qalaŋ qas~ɕa.ħija jaβa(*aniel orteɣa ʦ~ʨer*a) ru jaja(li*ia s~ɕaa*e*ra) ħmtuj s~ɕeziʔ.orteɣa ru ħija s~ɕaziŋ mts~ɕwe mrkjas~ɕ lɣa,mwaħ mlaħaŋ na s~ɕquilq.ħija mts~ɕew (ħumβerto orteɣa) ɣa mħetaj ru miru βiru pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja. ʦ~ʨamilo orteɣa maki s~ɕeziʔ uzi.ħija maki qs~ɕujan kneril ɣermania lalu nja,wal mħuqil la. ħija mus~ɕa ħkaŋiʔ mtzjaw,qutux ŋas~ɕal ariŋ la liβerta* mus~ɕa *uiɣalpa teħok manaɣua .orteɣa ru mts~ɕwe mqwas~ɕ βaħ las~ɕalle pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija ru arnol*o aleman mrħuw mqwas~ɕ βiru nħa. ** kawas~ɕ nja lɣa,orteɣa s~ɕnaʦ~ʨkaʔ s~ɕeziʔ ħlaħuj kkjapun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa, ħela tmwaŋ(*s~ɕln)ħlaħuj.**** kawas~ɕ,orteɣa mus~ɕa ɣuatemala ,maki qas~ɕa mrħuw klaħaŋ alaŋ kkjapun la. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija s~ɕaŋkaʔ s~ɕmi lukus~ɕ ru qβuβu ini ktan rkjas~ɕ nja mus~ɕa qmuŋ pira ru qaja s~ɕquilq maki amerika. **** kawas~ɕ *aniel orteɣa ru ros~ɕario murillo kekoŋ la.qs~ɕaħuj qnxan maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi ms~ɕqun mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨos~ɕta riʦ~ʨa . **** kawas~ɕ orteɣa ru murillo ms~ɕpun la.maɣal roman kjokja mkɣluw.qani ms~ɕjaħaw maki s~ɕpat laqi nja.murillo s~ɕkajal na s~ɕquilq pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja,maki orteɣa s~ɕeziʔ kos~ɕi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
